author: Marvel YouTube
text:
MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls | Knights of Doom Trailer
The Champion may have destroyed entire planets, but he has never faced the Knights of Doom!

The fourth team to enter the fray in MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls is led by Doctor Doom, joined by a merciless host of villains as new playable characters: Magneto, Green Goblin, and Carnage!

Coming to PS5 and PC on August 6th, 2026!
Pre-order now: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marvel-tokon-fighting-souls/

Follow us for all the latest updates:

author: Marvel YouTube
text:
Marvel’s Wolverine – Extended Gameplay Trailer | PS5 Games
With the fate of humans and mutants hanging in the balance, Logan knows the world needs a hero. However, they’ll have to settle for Wolverine. Get an expanded look at gameplay from Marvel's Wolverine, which teases major characters, story details, and more!

Marvel’s Wolverine arrives on PlayStation 5 consoles September 15, 2026. Pre-order now.

© 2026 MARVEL
© 2026 Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc.
Developed by Insomniac Games, Inc.

author: Marvel YouTube
text:
Marvel Legends Series: Secret Wars | Marvel Unpacked
Join us on the second episode of Marvel Unpacked, where we unpack the Marvel Legends Secret Wars wave. Learn about these Super Heroes' lore through fun facts and unboxing the accessories that come with each character! Click below to view a specific character unpacking:

00:00 - Intro
00:25 - Spider-Man (Alien Costume)
01:30 - Daredevil
02:48 - Marvel's Falcon
04:04 - Marvel's Magik
05:19 - Absorbing Man 
06:22 - Constrictor
